channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: THE GREEN CANDLE OF VENGEANCE HAS BEEN RAISED — 4 replies — 16.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
THE GREEN CANDLE OF VENGEANCE HAS BEEN RAISED

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-02-28 20:19 UTC

OP

It's time to smite the infidels

Early replies (first 3)

61917181
>>61917174
It makes no sense

61917184
The markets have been acting irrational ever since Jane Street was taken out. it's like we returned to clown world or something.

61917190
>>61917181
Crypto is used to transport wealth out of warzones, it makes perfect sense.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61917191
>>61917174
TKD

item.title: SELL — 49 replies — 196.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
SELL

Open thread • Replies: 49 • Updated: 2026-02-28 20:11 UTC

OP

SELL

Early replies (first 3)

61913500
>>61913487
Anthropic is private. But they're the best and most useful AI for coding and tech work. I am Yolo buying their IPO when it drops. I use Claude every day all the time at work.

61913507
What is this orange NIGGER smoking and can I have some

61913513
i never heard of these shitcoins until last year
easy come easy go

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61914390
>>61913500
Fucking same. Claude is what I use too, and I just wrote this post 61914373

61914503
>>61913584
>turned into

61914514
>>61913487
Is he retarded?

61914583
>>61913487
chatgpt is such dogshit i can't even

61914920
>>61913548
great call

61914951
>>61913500
I use Claude to post on 4chan, talking about how great Claude is.

61915052
>>61913727
2 side 1 coin.

61915368
>>61913500
the ipo is canceled lmao this company is dead

61915380
>>61913533
he has lost his fucking mind
even populist diehards will struggle to defend this
>no mass surveillance
>no autonomous weapons
that was Anthropics two asks, which the DoD has agreed to in its contract. then that clown Hegseth tried to change the contract.
reminder they absolutely want both.

61915387
>>61913584
pretty crazy how reddit troons have infested this place dario is a retard
>>61914157
yeah im sure the feds will just let them move the weights offshore china even why not for the keks

61915393
>>61915387
how does that orange cock taste?

61915423
>>61915393
three more years

61915431
he should let claude write his posts, they would be better for it

61915433
>>61915423
not an argument
i accept your concession

61915439
>>61913487
What’s Antrophic?

61915486
>>61915439
>What’s Antrophic?
The best and most useful for real work AI.
https://www.zerohedge.com/ai/simulated-war-games-top-ai-models-recommended-using-nukes-95-time

61915496
>>61913602
This

61915528
>>61913500
I swap between the different models while coding in copilot, the difference is minimal at best. Claude is usually the best but only marginally.

61915534
>>61913584
You sound like a woman.

61915573
>>61914514
Amodei? yes
they don't win vs us gov on "you can't use our token prediction math to predict those particular tokens"
bring on the collapse. acc

61915594
>>61913584
The who point of ai is to build a dystopian fascist techostate. If Trump can't send a drone at anyone who disagrees with him, what's the point? Cat videos and porn?

61915601
>>61915380
If we don't build mass surveillance with autonomous drone cops enforcing social and civil harmony, China will.

61915616
>>61915601
cool, i would rather we dont and China go full retard on authoritarian police state.
orange retard should have stayed in his lane. deport illegals and get inflation under control. he is completely off track here.
history will remember this as administration as among the worst for its mercurial leader.

61915740
>>61915616
It seems to be a common trend among alt-right leaders and parties when they get power. They’re voted in for the sole reason of getting non-whites out of white countries, but then they start doing all kinds of weird big moves and changes when nobody asked to change anything except deporting non-whites.

61915959
>>61913487
>The US federal government is at war with the US' top research institutions, the US' green sectors, and now also the US' leading AI company
It gets better and better

61915969
>>61913487
epstein cunny for me, death in ww3 and autonomous surveillance for thee!

61915977
>>61915528
>coding in copilot
Kek. You're already behind the times, boomer.

61916025
>>61913567
>Implying the CIA doesn't love profiting off political corruption

61917088
Just bask in the unhingedness off that tweet, the random ALL CAPS, the double speak, the pettiness.

61917169
Mornin' goldbros

item.title: $120,000 a year is $10,000 a month. That is ALOT of money. — 43 replies — 96.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
$120,000 a year is $10,000 a month. That is ALOT of money.

Open thread • Replies: 43 • Updated: 2026-02-28 19:53 UTC

OP

$120,000 a year is $10,000 a month. That is ALOT of money.

Early replies (first 3)

61910225
Let me guess, there is 4 people with this job

61910236
>>61910225
I dont get it

61910240
>>61910170
Get a clearance and work for one of the intelligence agencies NGA or NGIS and make way more.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61910999
>>61910294
>it needs to be medically necessary,
you have never used one idiot, you don't need a note from any doctor, and you can use all that money to pay Medicare premiums once you retire. you will 100% use the money in a HSA and getting it pretaxed increases your actual disposable income

61911310
>>61910999
>you have never used one idiot, you don't need a note from any doctor,
i literally used my HSA card yesterday at a dentist appointment you dumb fucking nigger.
>you don't need a note from any doctor
https://www.healthequity.com/hsa-qme

61911598
>>61910252
Basically, after covering all the basics to live ok now and in the future you really don't have much "disposable" income.

$7k doesn't count rent, utilities, car insurance, car maintenance, gas, food

61911639
>>61910263
The point of a HSA is that you never spend it, it reduces your taxable income and after age 59 it’s basically a traditional 401(k).

>get 401(k) match
>max HSA
>max Roth
>go back and max 401(k) if you can

61911652
>>61911598
>make $80k
>max 401(k), HSA, Roth, and do another 10 percent to backdoor Roth
>$1,350 in total monthly expenses
>$600 to do whatever with each month
But also, I split the rent and my gf buys the groceries because she earns more. YMMV.

61913412
>>61910240
Do you have someone i can contact?

61913572
>>61910246
Hilarious pic, anon.

61913990
>>61913412
Move to DC

61914025
>>61910263
>if you don't get sick then you can't really touch it.
You can use that shit on anything. I'm wearing a pair of prescription glasses that cost around $5k that I paid for with my HSA, half of that being an employer match. You can use it to buy exercise equipment, red light panels, whatever. Basically if you ever buy anything tangentially related to health, you can pay for it with your HSA.

61914045
>>61910170
I make 120k a year.
Right off the bat, I take home maybe half of it.
Do I need to keep talking? This country is a scam.

61914081
>>61910170
It used to be. Not any more.

61914098
>>61914045
Yeah, for some reason this is considered rich when it is the buying power of a butcher in the 70s. And it’s taxed like it’s rich

61914137
>>61914098
Median income in the U.S. is around $80k a year.

61914164
>>61914137
Why do people use the median as some kind of argument? The median is a lesser quantity of life than your parents median and people should be more upset over it.

61914188
i.e. the median nominal wage is relative. Real wages are dogshit. It’s a good divide and conquer strategy to get folks fighting about the “outlier” that is a mere 30k more taxed at a higher bracket

61915225
>>61910170
170k/yr here, after tax it's about $120k/yr

61916482
>>61914164
I’m doing better than my parents in every capacity at $80k beyond the inability to buy a home. And even then, I really don’t give a shit about it beyond the prospect of building more wealth.

61916504
>>61910263
There's always something you can spend it on, and most of them let you invest in stocks or something in. Even better if your employer is the one contributing to it. HSA is free money for smart people.

61916518
>>61916482
Impressive level of cattle cope.

61916554
>>61915225
250k/yr here, after tax it's about $150k/yr

61916594
>>61910170
Unironically my w2 pay is $180k and my take home after taxes and everything is $10k. My 1099 income is taxed at like 40%.
Without taxes I make around $250k/yr, after taxes and insurance I make around $160k. I lose about $100k a year to the spic nig cycle

61916698
>>61916482
>beyond the inability to buy a home.
so you're actually doing far worse than your parents. what do you think is going to happen when you try to retire? rents are $1.5k+ for a 1 bedroom in most of the USA. social security is barely $1.5k a month for most people. i hope you're putting a LOT of money into retirement investments.

61916724
>>61914045
I really wish we had the ability to opt out of social security and just got that money tax free.

61916831
>>61916724
kek
Social only works when everyone who does function is forced to pay for 4 other people too. If you can opt out, most would, leaving only the ones who can't pay in the pool. It wouldn't work.
The only thing you can do is go places where it's different.

61916983
>>61910170
I make that in almost two weeks

61917050
>>61910170

61917056
>>61917050

61917061
>>61917056
I’d say an ALOT stack of money is roughly 600k USD, not 100k. OP wrong as usual.

61917100
>>61914025
so you blew $5K on fucking glasses and think that is a flex, kek.

61917113
>>61917050
It doesn't look like a cross

item.title: Its LINK season — 77 replies — 63.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Its LINK season

Open thread • Replies: 77 • Updated: 2026-02-28 19:07 UTC

OP

Act accordingly

Early replies (first 3)

61900759
>>61900750
did the March larp was true?????

61900762
This pump won't fail like all the others.

61900776
pump's already failed, stinkie

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61904485
I need ro sell my stinkies, please provide exit liquidity

61904534
piece of shit can't even sustain a minor 15% pump
I'm never getting out of this shitcoin, FUCK

61904571
>>61904534

61904855
>>61904534

61904970
>>61904468
>>61904855
perma BAN the cuckolds from /biz/

61905034
>>61903396
So you're saying the dump is yet to come?

61905049
Buy up my LINK marines! Slurp up as much as you can! You will NEVER be able to buy LINK for under $10 after this
I already bought another bag and I am feeling cool like a diamond hands

61906253
>>61905034
no this is what happened during that relentless dump in late jan, early feb
jane street was convicted of market manipulation and exited crypto entirely, they are gone now

61906480
we're dumping my basterds

61906492
>>61904970
>is being barely worth
Brown, street shitting hands typed this

61906504
>>61900750
>It's LINK season
>Turn on TV to watch the new episode
>It's still just a bunch of brown retards crying that the price isn't in the double digits
It's funny, but the writers for this show need to get some new material at some point.

61906539
Jane Street got some chutzpah to go back to their 10am dump bot, or their General Counsel is a hyper jew who told them not to change anything because it would look lke an admission of guilt.

61906562
The bottom is 0

61906587
>>61902357
>>61902426
hey stinkie look at the current chart and then say:
>y-you were right. mr. FUD master sir
:}

61906671
>>61904970
their website isn't down, fake news

61906753
I'm not ready to buy more until we hit $4

61907077
>>61906539
btc is back to following the nasdaq price here, thats expected behavior
it was the rather giant disconnect lately that was the obvious manipulation

61909825
>>61900750
LINK CHAINLINK SILVER SERGEY SEX

61909859
>>61904970
your persecution only makes my will to never sell even stronger. my ducks are in a row, can you say the same?

61912039
>already back to $8 dollars and crashing
ayo stinkchinks, ww@

61912147
waiting for $5 to buy more

61912575
remember when the stinkies had hope recently :} now that hope has evaporated
gone up in smoke
nothing but sadness and misery remains :}

61912625
I am hopeful, nothing but hapiness and joy remains :}

61913019
>>61901638
>after march

sooo..4 more weeks?

61915768
the absolute state of cuckold marines LOL

61915821
>>61915768
>LINK on sale
>this is somehow a bad thing
just bought another bag :)

61915828
>>61915821
it's been on sale for half a decade stinky

61916948
>>61900750
>LINK season declared
So thats why Trump started WW3… you have killed us all OP

61916978
>>61916948
lmao
Would you even be surprised if that was true at this point?

item.title: ISREAL BOMBS IRAN — 80 replies — 47.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
ISREAL BOMBS IRAN

Open thread • Replies: 80 • Updated: 2026-02-28 18:38 UTC

OP

EVERYTHING DUMPING

WWIII

How fucked are we?

Early replies (first 3)

61915005
>>61914991
Nothing burger

61915010
>>61914991
i have a certified iq of 143 and i'm telling you the markets will open higher on monday

61915015
>>61914991
It will be over before monday

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61915980
Market plummets Monday right?

61916001
>>61915022
certain stocks are OTH

61916014
>>61915858
not falling for it, rabbi. jews are as big a threat as muslims. you will both be tortured to death in this life and the next.

61916062
>>61915039
If it happens, it won't happen before market open on Monday

61916069
>>61915131
About 1/5 of the world's oil is produced in the Persian Gulf region. Iran has spent the last few hours demonstrating that they are quite capable of precise strikes on facilities along the Gulf coast. It remains to be seen whether they will decide to bomb the oil infrastructure.

61916079
>>61916014
I'm not Jewish, you retard.

61916118
>>61915858
You don't know your ragheads. The US/Israel are attacking the other type of ragheads. Iranians are the type of ragheads who know how to build a modern, well-functioning, industrialized country - and that's why their continued existence is intolerable to Israel. Iran is a country that even has its own independent space program. Also, Iran accepts the existence of other religions and muslim denominations, even making a point of having a token jew and a token zoroastrian in their parliament.

Fun fact: Iran and Iran-aligned militias were instrumental in defeating ISIS

61916145
>>61915112
>Iran is no Iraq
They're weaker, the regime literally has no support inside the country. You can't fight an enemy without an army.

61916148
>>61916079
see >>61916118 this guy's post as well, rabbi. iranians aren't 50 IQ sand niggers.

61916155
So is this time the real deal? Not like last year when it was just some tactical bombings?

61916159
Do people not realize that Iran mines a fuck ton of crypto which means they will have to start a fuck ton to fund this war?

61916176
>>61916118
You have no clue what you're talking about. The leadership is a bunch of Arabs thats killing Persians aka real Iranians.

61916178
>>61916176
>Persians
I fucking hate Iranians who still call themselves that

61916201
>>61915858
>>61916079
Lol what is this 60 year old guy typing dawg that aint it

61916203
Republicans starting wars, again

61916208
I unironically have TDS; this orange baboon drives me fucking crazy. Get me out of this timeline.

61916211
Iran is now bombing crypto influencers in Dubai lmao

61916240
>>61916211
the fuck? source or didn't happen

61916251
I will be honest, I hope a lot of burgers will die for Israel. You burgers deserve much more for subversion you suffered and did nothing about it. Now your military is completely controlled by the tribe and your carriers and planes are doing what Bibi tells them to do. Embarrassing.

61916254
>>61916240
Just look up Iran missile Dubai

61916479
Geopolitical bros, what are your thoughts about this? Do you think this will end up like what happened a year ago or this is the real deal?

I wouldn't like to see a v shape recovery.

Pls, I don't wanna have to go to /pol/ and talk to those people.

61916505
>>61916479
Unpopular opinion: Nothing ever happens.
The US does not have the industry capacity for a war with Iran.

61916522
>>61915128
He’s ending the war, not starting it, dipshit.

61916526
>>61916251
What do you think will happen, fag, when there is no one left to fight in the Middle East?

Cannibalize the master...

61916528
>>61916522
We’ve always been at war with Eurasia, etc etc.

61916704
>>61915888
For me it’s Metallica Mob

61916728
>>61916211
A selfless and victimless act.
My heartfelt commiseration goes to Iran.

61916733
>>61916479
Iran's regime cucked itself into a corner. It's being attacked by Israel and it's golem, all the while its populace hates the regime and want to overthrow it. It's literally ogre for the regime. All they can do now is go out with a bang and try to cause as much destruction as possible. The regime leadership should've fled to Russia when they had the chance.

61916849
Do you guys think the mexican peso will be affected much if at all by this?
I was shorting EURMXN friday. i think i might be earning a ton when the market opens

item.title: We all got psyopped here into being NEETS in the 2010’s to make it seem cool to the masses that owning nothing and being… — 26 replies — 30.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
We all got psyopped here into being NEETS in the 2010’s to make it seem cool to the masses that owning nothing and being…

Open thread • Replies: 26 • Updated: 2026-02-28 19:28 UTC

OP

We all got psyopped here into being NEETS in the 2010’s to make it seem cool to the masses that owning nothing and being happy is the way.

Early replies (first 3)

61909740
I think theres some grain of truth though
A guy with a job buys a house off the bank and is doing a lot to keep with the jonanses and is in debt doesnt have a thousand for an emergency and yet is a hardass about it
Vd
Being a neet paying some rent and pirating games

61909770
>being a NEET was ever a choice
eye shiggi

61909794
>>61909740
>pirating games
Based

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61909810
I was a neet and well, it was what it was. I was a fuck up but decided to put my shit together. Went to trade school. Didn't miss a single day, got my good grades for 2 years and when you finish you get an internship. I was a good boy and got an internship at what it seemed like a decent company.

All ready to begin in april 2020 hehe. Covid hit and the internship got cancelled. Nobody hired me after the 2 years of lockdowns and not having done any internship (so no experience after finishing the stupid degree).

It's over for me, so whatever. With my crypto portfolio and whatever my parents left me when they die, I will make do.

61910316
>>61909810
Based

61910332
>>61909724
being a NEET in your 20s is funny.
being a NEET in your 30s is alarming.
being a NEET in your 40s is ruinous and permanently so.

61910338
>>61909770
>eye shiggi
Wow I didn't know there was anyone this old left. Have a good day.

61910347
>>61909724
there is no such thing as a neet. they unemployed incels leeching of their parents.

61910352
>>61909724
People were psyopped into being wagies as well. Id rather be a NEET

61910368
>>61909810
>with my crypto
Lol

61910373
>>61910332
>>>61909724(OP)
>being a NEET in your 10s is funny.
>being a NEET in your 20s is alarming.
>being a NEET in your 30s is ruinous and permanently so.
>by your 40s you've already either made it or resigned to killing yourself when your parents kick you out or die

>>61910347
Where are the jobs that pay enough at the entry level to afford a house, jew?

61912105
>>61909724
The dichotomy between NEETs and wagies is a false one
On the one hand the NEET is completely right that labor within modern institutions is conditioning the mind to slavish servitude, and that most profit of the labor is sluiced off to parasites engineering the destruction of mankind.
On the other hand, the wagie is correct that man and labor are interconnected and that man was not designed for laziness but is an inherently active and industrious creature.
The true synthesis of this false dichotomy is the self-sufficient man, the man of the land, he that owns the most primary means of survival and labors to scrape a living off of bare rocks if fate demands it, beholden to none but the physical realities resulting from his own toil
He is the Yeoman, the Free Farmer, the true synthesis of man's need to work and man's rejection of Servitude.
the Yeoman's Republic as America was meant to be, as Jefferson dreamt of; a nation of free farmers united in love for liberty and justice, and rejection of servitude in any form.

Reject the false dichotomy, acquire the land and never sell. Eat worms (eat ze bugz) if you have to, as long as they are YOUR worms on YOUR land.

61912116
>>61909724
Im only here because 4chan was invented by Jeffrey Epstein

61912371
>>61910368
>>61910316
It sucks but it is what it is. I must admit that at least, I had a lot of fun up until that day covid hit and lost my internship. Now, just chilling, reading books, watching a movie every now and then, youtube, stacking sats and doing some hyperliquid trades. Could be worse.

61912394
I turned my neet hobby into a business with multiple revenue streams

61912497
>>61912394
are you live streaming goon sessions or what?

61912555
>>61909724
If you're a NEET, you're not white.

61912563
>>61910332
Being a neet in your 20s is concerning.

61912616
>>61912563
being a neet forever is based

61912634
>>61910332
NEETs of all ages are based

61912709
>>61909724
I got a job but I am a friendless 31yo khhv. I would rather neet about but I love my parents and want to support them. But I'd give all of my savings for a woman to pretend to love me, as long as she is convincing enough.

61912860
>>61909724
it began before that, offshoring resource extraction and manufacturing industries basically guaranteed the west would never enjoy true independence again
convincing your military aged men to give up on society was the final nail in the coffin, enabling nepobaby corporate heads to continue claiming ownership of infrastructure that we have become reliant on third-world slavery to even develop in the first place
the allure of comfort was our achilles heel

61912919
>>61912860
Saved. Gonna show this to my dad.

61913657
everyone will be forced into neetdom

61917032
>>61913657
True 4chan is always ahead of the curve.

61917040
>>61909724
> 2010
Damn time travelers. Forcing people into things they've been doing since birth.

item.title: TRUMP YOU NIGGER — 14 replies — 18.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
TRUMP YOU NIGGER

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-02-28 19:34 UTC

OP

WHAT HAVE YOU DONE? ARE YOU MAD?

Early replies (first 3)

61916534
>>61916524
But paxg is going up? This just further shows that bitcoin is not digital gold, it's just leveraged nasdaq.

61916543
why is one related to the other ?

61916558
>>61916534
>it's just leveraged nasdaq.
No nasdaq went up the last months while btc went down. Btc is its own class.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61916562
>>61916524

61916568
>>61916558
ackschually, highly correlated to nasdaq, with about double or tiple its volatility

61916584
>>61916568
No anymore that was before 2024. Check the charts.

61916602
>>61916524
Bullish for ADA

61916609
>>61916524
Bullish for trumps Jew and pedophile retainers

61916639
>>61916568
BTC diverged from Nasdaq just like sotware stocks

>>61916534
Gold is likely to find a top shortly after a global conflict if it turns out that the economy remains mostly unaffected by it

61916794
>>61916524
Tbh this is your fault for noticing Isreal manipulating the markets.

61916909
>>61916524

fake news.

61916930
>>61916794
Oy Vey!!! How dare you insult America's master.

61916991
>>61916639
>economy remains mostly unaffected by it
Yes I'm sure the government is going to turn off the money printer now that we are at war.

item.title: /PMG/ Vs. Janestreet — 65 replies — 15.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
/PMG/ Vs. Janestreet

Open thread • Replies: 65 • Updated: 2026-02-28 16:01 UTC

OP

Anon pointed this out here >>61904592

How badly does this fuck silver?

Early replies (first 3)

61904680
>>61904656
Wm ethena cz trump and who knows what else.... Its a big club.

61904684
>>61904656
>How badly does this fuck silver

Jane Street Wikipedia Notable past employees:
>Sam Bankman-Fried and Caroline Ellison, founders of FTX

>Brett Harrison, current CEO of trading technology firm Architect Financial Technologies

>Zvi Mowshowitz, writer who covers topics in artificial intelligence

>Ophelia Bauckholt, quantitative trader associated with the Zizian rationalists

Man just looking at their founders notable history is nuts

>Jane Street faced scrutiny in June 2025 over its co-founder, Robert Granieri, facing allegations of funding an attempted coup against South Sudan by Ajak and Abraham Keech. The matter was resolved with no charges being brought against Granieri.

Either silver is fucked or going to be ok, all depends on if these globohomo transhumanist (((bankers))) finally lose.
So basically silver is fucked.

61904692
>>61904684
jane street is a quant trading firm, they are not investment bankers

the losses are held by their ETF customers

61900237

61900244
>>61900235
OK, THEN SELL

61900286
>>61900156
They can function a couple ways... I learned in my business entities law class but all I remember is a sale of all assets. So ways require shareholder approval, others don't

61900297
cash on hands: 10B

61900941
Not selling!
70.

61901344
Looked into it and the fundamentals look bullish. Solid cash flow, alot of cash on hand. Possible buyout on the horizon and stock has taken a beating. Venmo alone is a huge asset. Just bought a bag.

61901538
>>61901344

61902103
https://x.com/ArarNecmettin/status/2026726277357695290?s=20
120-200$

61902172
I bought this shit at $52 like an idiot. I don't want a merger or a buy out. I want them to get their shit together and expand. They own venmo, the need to capitalize on that and take over the little fish with buyer protection.

61902704

item.content:encoded:
WHO THE FUCK KEEPS BUYING?!

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-02-28 19:42 UTC

OP

STOOOOPPPPP ITTTTTTTTT

Early replies (first 3)

61916344
>>61916338

61916358
>>61916338
once all of the swing traders, boomers, fomotards, unbelievers and non-hodlers sell, there is no one left.
60, unfortunately for bobo, is an infinite buy wall for long term hodlers and gigaslurpers, who have no intention to ever take profit.
The only sell pressure you will EVER get at this support level is from short sellers.
Keep going. We will slurp forever. You might get it below 60k momentarily, but this isn't your asset anymore. It's ours.

61916392
>>61916338
probably bots that don't take anything into account other than price. Volume has barely changed in the last few days

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61916405
>>61916338
Just assume 90% of price action is degenerate leverage fags being forced to buy/sell. Within that framework all fluctuations are fakes, or fake fakeout, fake fake fakeouts to fuck over as much as possible.

61917027
WHY DOES IT KEEP GOING UP?!?!?!?!??!!?

61917077
FUUUUUUCCKKKKK WHYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYY

61917083
Bobo's getting rekt

item.title: Why isn't crypto war proof? Why is it doing WORSE actually? — 16 replies — 8.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why isn't crypto war proof? Why is it doing WORSE actually?

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-02-28 18:29 UTC

OP

Why isn't crypto war proof? Why is it doing WORSE actually?

Early replies (first 3)

61915162
Unironically suppressing LINK

61915165
>>61915159
Because it's 24/hr

61915171
If you know what they do, why not playing their game instead of crying like a bitch? Everybody knows the deal. Friday comes, American goyim go back to their missuses and the jews start their shenanigans.

Then, usually on monday, depending on how the shenanigans developped during the weekend, we have a juicy crash. Things get quiet, maybe some fake pumps, until friday.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61915179
>>61915162
why the fuck do you keep flopping around threads saying that this bullshit is intended to suppress link?

Could you fucking explain, please?

61915197
>>61915179
Whats there to explain

LINK and ETH simply arent allowed to pump

61915218
>>61915197
>they're not allowed to pump because, uh, they're just not.

Okay, cool. I don't see how Iran getting its shit pushed in has anything to do with that, but I thought maybe you knew and would care to explain.

61915226
>>61915159
Stocks usually go down when war starts. BTC usually goes down when stocks go down. Other coins usually go down when BTC goes down. Something like that.

61915232
>>61915159
Because crypto is digital fairy dust. When the chips land on the table, what matters is physical assets.

61915242
well looks like this is the bottom so no need to complain much longer. 63k is unbreakable support.

61915247
Lmao gold and silver mooning and bitcoin crashing

61915253
>>61915218
Idk why, but they are doing it, literally everyone saw this shit will happen yesterday, here is the recipe for trump and his leveraging kids: >>61915057

61915254
>>61915242
This shit is going below 60 before Monday.

61915256
>>61915162
Yes it’s a grand conspiracy to make the cuckolds look bad. Keep holding marines!

61915258
>>61915254
Why? They are already buying back!

61916737
>>61915159
RISK ON ASSET.

61916817
>>61915159
It's not done to fuck the crypto market. The opposite. It is done to amplify what the cycle does anyway. Every bear market. This isn't new. The glowies won't harm their asset and plan.
